title: Argentinian Pilaf with Winey Twist
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish with the twist of winey flavors, perfect for a dinner or special occasion.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add wine and cook until almost completely reduced, stirring occasionally.
Add pilaf spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes.
Add rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add water and salt, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until rice is cooked.
Fluff with a fork and serve hot.
